evidence.summary: ONS Services PPI latest bulletin (legal/accountancy series)

finding: ONS SPPI reachable for inflation deflator. Recipe is fundamentally an internal ANOVA on fee-earner recovery rates.
method: Existence: ONS SPPI provides services-inflation deflator; Armstrong Watson recovery benchmark is a published-but-paywalled industry survey, not open data.
notes: Methodology (ANOVA on recovery rates) is industry-standard and supported by activity-based-costing literature.
